case_title: ARANETA FRANCES VS LAYUG HERMINIA C et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAYUG HERMINIA C BUDJI CORPORATION
